description: Understated ethnic footwear without fancy embellishments for an earthy vibe by catwalk. Wear this pair if you are tired of the over the top ethnic footwear. This versatile piece looks great with form fitting denims, a kurti and bright ethnic accessories. You can also wear this with traditional churidhars or leggings and a kurta from mother earth. UpperHeavily embellished strap to hold the midfoot in placeEmbellished toe holderA synthetic leather strap connecting the toe holder and midfoot strapMildly padded footbed with stitch detailing and embossed brandingOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heel and branded grooves for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
